offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month, compliance documentation delays cause penalties from licensing authorities. We simplify document preparation instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in preparing timely compliance documentation for licensing authorities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try Template-based document generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
